summary: A local television news segment. It shows exterior footage of a library building beside a street with parked vehicles, intercut with a close shot of a scanned document with redaction bars, and an on-the-street interview with an older woman in a beanie and patterned coat holding a microphone. A lower-third chyron reads MAN CHARGED WITH KIDNAPPING 4-YEAR-OLD GIRL.

script.scene: Exterior footage of a library building beside a street, captioned about a kidnapping charge.
An on-the-street interview with an older woman in a beanie and patterned coat.
